description: Start LambdaTest Android cloud session. Supports both app-specific and full device-wide testing.
when_to_use: User asks to start cloud Android session on LambdaTest
User asks to run Android test on LambdaTest device
User explicitly asks for cloud execution
User wants to test the whole Android device on cloud
User wants to test without a specific app
prerequisites: A valid LambdaTest app id is required ONLY for app-specific testing, not for device-wide testing

app_testing.description: Test a specific app uploaded to LambdaTest

device_wide_testing.description: Real-device sessions do not send appPackage/autoLaunch to the hub (often rejected). Omit app (no lt://); the server starts a bare session then opens Settings via Appium activate_app / start_activity.

slot_prompts.cloud_device_name: Which device? Default is Galaxy S25
slot_prompts.app: Provide LambdaTest app ID (lt://...) for app testing. Skip for device-wide testing.
slot_prompts.cloud_app_package: For device-wide testing, Android package to open (e.g. com.android.settings).
slot_prompts.cloud_app_activity: For device-wide testing, activity (e.g. .Settings) with the package above.

examples.query: Start lambdatest android session for my app
Start lambdatest android session to test the whole device
Start lambdatest android session on Galaxy S24 with Android 14
